meaning.black_vs_white_payoff: row black model's score as black against column white model as white
meaning.black_elo: role-separated black-model MLE Elo from joint alpha model; mean centered to 1200
meaning.white_elo: role-separated white-model MLE Elo from joint alpha model; mean centered to 1200
meaning.black_advantage_elo: fitted global first-move advantage for black, used as black_elo - white_elo + black_advantage_elo
meaning.black_model_payoff_for_elo: derived square payoff among black models from MLE black skills
meaning.white_model_payoff_for_elo: derived square payoff among white models from MLE white skills
